name: Rabies
description: Required for all dogs in Hong Kong. First vaccination at 3 months, booster within 30 days, then every 3 years.

name: DHPP/DAPP
description: Distemper, Hepatitis, Parainfluenza, Parvovirus. Core vaccine for dogs.

name: Bordetella
description: Kennel cough. Required for dogs in boarding facilities.

name: Leptospirosis
description: Leptospira bacteria vaccine. Recommended for dogs in Hong Kong.

name: Canine Influenza
description: Dog flu vaccine. Recommended for social dogs.

name: Rabies
description: Required for cats in Hong Kong. First vaccination at 3 months.

name: FVRCP
description: Feline Viral Rhinotracheitis, Calicivirus, Panleukopenia. Core vaccine for cats.

name: FeLV
description: Feline Leukemia Virus. Recommended for outdoor cats.
